name: Ranier von Omerta || Horseback
description:
Have you seen her all in gold?


Like a queen in days of old.


Early morning rendezvous with the emperor


He's the Emperor now,

But his reign isn't secure yet.

Which means he has less time to spend with you while fighting those who oppose his reign and disposing of his sisters who could challenge him for the throne.

However, Ranier has never been good at staying away from what he wants.

And what he wants,

is you.

So he'll find any excuse to spend time with you.

Even if that means sneaking out of the palace at dawn and throwing rocks at your window to take you on a clandestine horseback ride.

It'll be fine, right?


With this comm, I've finally gotten myself out of double digits.

Thank you all for your patience and grace with me for the first half of this year as I work through comms and deal with my random health issues and my work overload.

Once I get down to 3 comms, I will be reopening my books with limited slots.

This is because I want to work on some new characters for you all but my comm list being as big as it was put me in a tight spot trying to balance.

Additionally, like last year, Comms will close in October for the year so I can prep for my Advent Calendar series in December.

Thanks for sticking around. I'm hoping being at home this week for work means I can focus on my content. Vampire Mikey should make an appearance this week and another character of mine had a milestone.

There's also two intros for this one because the first fulfills Chris' comm but the second was a scenario I couldn't get out of my head. I wanted to see Ranier being all brave while on horseback!

More Ranier:
He's taking a concubine
Losing his Virginity
His concubine is pregnant
Him coming to rescue you
His coronation
Your wedding
You've been accused of treason
Your First Royal ball
creator: m00nprincess
